author: guily
name: brelt wip 2xh100 20min package
blurb: non-record 2xh100 scaling package for brelt, a byte-level recurrent latent architecture. this run reached 1.9228 raw val_bpb and 1.9761 int8+zlib val_bpb in 20 minutes, while exposing a clear scaling pathology: segmentation opens too far and the latent stream becomes too cheap. included alongside a same-budget run of the original challenge baseline for direct comparison.
